tool.name: todoist_scrape_project
tool.description: Scrape a Todoist project by its numeric ID. Returns tasks with titles, due dates, priorities, and labels. Find the project ID from the URL when viewing a project (e.g. app.todoist.com/app/project/2349078265). Requires login.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Numeric project ID from the Todoist URL (e.g. '2349078265')
